title: tropilis subterrestris
intro:
Tropilis subterrestris, also known as Tropilaelaps subterrestris, is a species of mite that is often found on plants, particularly those in the genus Tropilaelaps. However, I couldn't find any information about a plant named Tropilis subterrestris. 

If I had to answer about a plant with a similar name, Tropilaelaps subterrestris is not considered to be a medicinal plant.
